name: Rupesh Yadav
summary: AWS Certified Solutions Architect building scalable applications with React, Node.js, FastAPI, and AWS.

experiences.title: Software Engineer
experiences.description: Designed and implemented enterprise-grade Jira plugin using Atlassian Forge, enabling reliable processing of 60K+ issues despite strict API rate limits through batching, retries, and resumable recovery. Architected core authentication and organization management for multi-tenant fintech SaaS platform, including tenant onboarding, RBAC, 2FA, password recovery, and secure access and refresh token rotation. Developed Playwright end-to-end tests covering authentication and tenant lifecycle, achieving 87% branch coverage.

experiences.title: Full Stack Developer
experiences.description: Engineered 11 proof-of-concept POC modules across HR, finance, inventory, and procurement, validating product-market fit. Built production-grade Resume Scraper (Lobby Network) automating job listings ingestion, resume parsing, and ML-based job-to-candidate matching with 40% auto-fill efficiency. Designed BrickoSys multi-tenant inventory system with schema-based tenant isolation, reducing manual tracking by 42%.

experiences.title: React Developer
experiences.description: Developed and customized frontend modules for Axelor Open Suite CRM, improving lead management workflows and UI consistency within low-code framework. Refactored shared React components to reduce duplication and improve maintainability, cutting redundant UI code by approximately 20%.

projects.title: ClearDays: Enterprise Multi-Tenant HRMS
projects.description: Designed scalable multi-tenant architecture using shared-database schema with row-level security supporting 200+ organizations. Architected hybrid RBAC and ABAC permission system with Redis caching achieving sub-100ms P99 latency.

projects.title: Lobby Network: Job Search Platform
projects.description: Developed job platform that scrapes listings from Workday and portals, performs stop-word removal and stemming, and matches jobs to candidates using parsed resume data. Auto-fills applications with 40% efficiency.

projects.title: AI Email Assistant
projects.description: Developed Gmail add-on using OpenAI APIs to generate context-aware replies with tone customization. Added speech-based input via Web Speech API and deployed backend inference on AWS Lambda.

projects.title: BrickoSys: Inventory & Warehouse MS
projects.description: Built multi-tenant inventory system for Lego parts with modular APIs for stock tracking, order picking, and warehouse management. Schema-based partitioning reduced manual tracking by 42%.

projects.title: E-Commerce Platform
projects.description: Full-stack MERN e-commerce with Stripe payment integration, admin analytics dashboard, inventory management, and secure JWT session handling.

projects.title: AI Chat Application
projects.description: Real-time chat with OpenAI integration, semantic conversation indexing, vector embeddings search, and instant message routing using Socket.io.

education.title: B.Tech in Computer Science and Engineering

achievements.title: AWS Certified Solutions Architect - Associate
achievements.description: Validated expertise in designing distributed, scalable, and secure systems on AWS cloud platforms.

achievements.title: GATE 2024 (CSE)
achievements.description: Achieved All India Rank 7700 (Top 8 percent Nationwide in Computer Science & Information Technology).
